generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures RGB-D data for environmental perception and object tracking using Intel RealSense D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ego vehicle speed via motor controller-integrated speed sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Tracks ego vehicle steering angle through servo mechanism-embedded sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data streamed from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR to Digital Twin via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "RGB-D data streamed from Intel RealSense D435i depth camera to Digital Twin via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time speed data transmitted from vehicle state sensors to Digital Twin via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time steering angle data transmitted from steering sensors to Digital Twin via ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks (position, velocity, size) generated by Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking module and transmitted to Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModule
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm implemented in Python/C++ for point cloud clustering."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering algorithm implemented in MATLAB/Simulink for tracking object states from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilteringEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic adhering to ISO 15622 for performance class I ACC, including distance-based speed control and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of vehicle state (speed, steering angle) collected and stored in SQL database for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, DataAnalysisEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of object tracks (position, velocity, size) stored in SQL database for performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, DataAnalysisEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data after DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraDataProcessed : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed depth camera data used for environmental perception and object tracking."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) for inter-component communication and modularity between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService, DataCollectionService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware programming and integration of autonomy components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for control algorithm development and complex tasks like point cloud processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlEnabler, PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering implementation in Python/C++ for processing raw LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering implementation in MATLAB/Simulink for tracking object states from clustered point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Combined DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering module for processing raw LiDAR data into structured object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing time-series vehicle state and object track data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DataAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data processing pipelines for analyzing time-series vehicle state and object track data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAnalysisService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control logic execution environment adhering to ISO 15622 standards."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serialization and deserialization of data between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D rendering libraries (OpenGL-based) integrated into 3D Visualization User Interface for real-time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance CommunicationProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UDP/TCP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication and ROS2 topics for intra-entity data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Serializes and transmits sensor data from Physical Twin to Digital Twin and vice versa using ROS2 middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationAction
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects real-time sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle state) and object tracks for Digital Twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataCollectionInsight
]

instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes raw sensor data (LiDAR point clouds) into structured object tracks using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedObjectTracksInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores time-series vehicle state and object track data in SQL database for historical analysis and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DataAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analyzes stored time-series data to derive insights on fuel economy, driving performance, and system anomalies."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataDrivenOptimizationInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes ACC commands (desired speed, emergency braking) based on lead vehicle distance and sends actuation commands to Physical Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimePerformanceMonitoringInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enabling/disabling of ACC, desired speed modification, and emergency braking via control panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteTroubleshootingAction, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports from stored data for developers and operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataReportingInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimePerformanceMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path to assess ACC performance in real-time."
]

instance DataDrivenOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of fuel economy and driving performance via stored time-series data (speed, distance to lead vehicle)."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies in sensor data (LiDAR noise) or actuator behavior (motor lag) for proactive maintenance."
]

instance AlgorithmValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of DT-computed ACC commands against real-world vehicle response to refine control strategies."
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series storage of vehicle state and object track data in SQL database for historical analysis."
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports from stored data for developers and operators."
]

instance RealTimeDataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Collection of real-time sensor data streams (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle state) for Digital Twin processing."
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks (position, velocity, size) generated from raw LiDAR data via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
]

instance DataTranslationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Serialization and transmission of sensor data between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computation and transmission of ACC commands (desired speed) from Digital Twin to Physical Twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmission of emergency braking commands from Digital Twin to Physical Twin via motor actuation system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteTroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote diagnosis of ACC logic or sensor fusion issues using collected data and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of Kalman filter parameters or communication protocols based on object track accuracy and latency measurements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller to adjust vehicle speed."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering angle through servo mechanism integrated into lower-level chassis."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Implements emergency braking via motor actuation system based on Digital Twin commands."
]

// C1: Components (Functional Entities)
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModule : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering (implemented in MATLAB/Simulink and Python/C++) to process raw LiDAR data into object tracks."
]

instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles serialization and deserialization of data between Physical Twin and Digital Twin entities using ROS2 middleware."
]

instance DataCollectionFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collects real-time sensor data (LiDAR, depth camera, vehicle state) and object tracks for Digital Twin processing."
]

instance ACCControlFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Executes Adaptive Cruise Control logic (ISO 15622 compliant) to compute desired speeds and emergency braking commands."
]

instance DataStorageComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database storing time-series vehicle state and object track data for analysis and reporting."
]

instance VisualizationUserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization User Interface Functional Entity providing real-time monitoring of vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path."
]

instance ControlPanelUserInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel User Interface Functional Entity enabling remote management of ACC (enable/disable, speed modification, emergency braking)."
]

// C1: Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera,
                 VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                 MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent,
                 EmergencyBrakingActuationComponent,
                 PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingModule,
                 DataCollectionFunctionalEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFunctionalEntity, ACCControlFunctionalEntity,
                 DataStorageComponent, DataAnalysisEnabler,
                 VisualizationUserInterface, ControlPanelUserInterface
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains VisualizationUserInterface, ControlPanelUserInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual DT to the physical twin (PT) include: **1) Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling Functional Entity** (Controlling FE) and sent to the **Actuation Functional Entity** (Actuation FE) to adjust the vehicle's speed via the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**. **2) Remote management commands**: Such as **enable/disable ACC**, **modify desired speed**, and **emergency braking**, transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface Functional Entity** (User Interface FE) to the PT. **3) Actuation signals**: Converted from desired speed commands into motor voltage commands by the **Actuation Functional Entity** and executed on the PT."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with **real-time synchronization** between the PT and DT, adhering to the following constraints: **1) End-to-end latency**: ≤ **100 ms** from the PT to the DT Entity, as per **3GPP Technical Specification 22.185** for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication. **2) Clock synchronization**: Devices must maintain **100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and coordination, though stricter synchronization is mandated in other safety-critical applications. **3) Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated at the frequency of the **LiDAR and camera sensors**, typically **10–30 Hz** for LiDAR and **30 Hz** for the depth camera. **4) Control loop**: ACC computations and actuation commands are executed at a frequency aligned with the **vehicle's dynamic response**, typically **10–100 Hz** depending on the system."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized into three primary entities, each deployed on distinct hardware components: **1) Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (PT hardware), hosting **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **data pre-processing modules** (Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, Actuation). **2) Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware (cloud/edge)**, hosting **core DT logic** (ACC computation, Data Collection, Data Storage, Reporting). **3) User Entity**: Deployed on a **separate user interface device**, hosting **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** components. **Inter-entity communication** occurs over **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)**, while **intra-entity communication** uses **ROS2 middleware**. The constellation adheres to **ISO 23247 Functional Entities (FEs)** but introduces custom entities (e.g., Physical Twin Entity) to better align with automotive requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is primarily used during the **operation phase** of the vehicle's lifecycle, but its design also supports **development and testing phases**. Key stages include: **1) Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC algorithms and system requirements (e.g., ISO 15622 for ACC). **2) Development Phase**: Enables **remote troubleshooting** and **data-driven validation** of ADAS systems via real-time monitoring and reporting. **3) Operation Phase**: Provides **real-time optimization** (e.g., fuel economy via DT-based monitoring), **health monitoring** (e.g., brake system prognosis), and **remote management** of ACC. The DT represents the PT in its **as-operated state**, with fidelity tailored to real-time control and monitoring requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: **1) Real-time synchronization**: **≤100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock accuracy** to maintain temporal alignment between PT and DT. **2) Data accuracy**: **LiDAR and camera sensors** provide high-fidelity environmental perception, while **Kalman filtering** refines object track estimates. **3) Control fidelity**: **ACC logic** adheres to **ISO 15622** for performance class I ACC, with validation against real-world dynamics. **4) Verification and validation**: **ROS2 middleware** ensures modular testing, while **real-time monitoring** (via 3D Visualization) allows operators to validate DT decisions. **5) Uncertainty handling**: **DBSCAN clustering** and **Kalman filtering** account for sensor noise and occlusions in object tracking. **6) Safety constraints**: **Emergency braking** and **remote management** commands are designed to override DT computations if safety-critical."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT includes: **1) Network Protocols**: **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication between the PT (Jetson Orin Nano) and the Digital Twin Entity (cloud/edge). **2) Intra-Entity Communication**: **ROS2 middleware** for intra-entity data exchange (e.g., between Physical Twin Entity components). **3) Data Translation**: **Data Translation Functional Entity** serializes and aligns message types between entities, performing **unit conversions** for compatibility. **4) Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185) to support real-time ACC control. **5) Clock Synchronization**: Devices must maintain **100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and coordination, achieved via **NTP or ROS2 time synchronization**. **6) Hardware Interfaces**: **LiDAR, camera, and motor controllers** communicate with the Jetson Orin Nano via **USB, Ethernet, or CAN bus** (depending on sensor specifications)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted and deployed across the following technical aspects: **1) Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the PT), running **ROS2 nodes** for sensor data processing and actuation. **2) Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on **external hardware (cloud/edge)**, such as a server or edge computing device, hosting **ACC computation**, **data storage (SQL database)**, and **reporting modules**. **3) User Entity**: Deployed on a **separate user interface device** (e.g., laptop or tablet) running the **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** components. **4) Software Stack**: **ROS2** for middleware, **Python/C++** for FE implementations, and **MATLAB/Simulink** for complex algorithms. **5) Communication Infrastructure**: **Wi-Fi network** for inter-entity communication, with **ROS2 topics** for intra-entity data flow. **6) Deployment Strategy**: Modular ROS2 packages allow for **scalable deployment** and **hardware-agnostic** upgrades."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration with external systems is not explicitly detailed in the document, but the DT is designed to support: **1) External Data Sources**: Potential integration with **V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) systems** for additional environmental data (e.g., traffic signals, other vehicle states). **2) Cloud Services**: **Data storage and reporting** could be extended to **cloud-based analytics platforms** for large-scale fleet management. **3) Digital Thread**: Alignment with **product lifecycle management (PLM) systems** to maintain an **end-to-end information flow** throughout the vehicle's lifecycle. **4) Standardized Interfaces**: Use of **ROS2** and **ISO 23247** enables interoperability with other DT systems or industrial IoT platforms. **5) Third-Party Tools**: Integration with **simulation tools (e.g., CREO Simulate)** for advanced testing or **AI/ML platforms** for predictive analytics."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The document does not explicitly address **data ownership and privacy**, but implications can be inferred: **1) Data Ownership**: Likely owned by the **vehicle owner or operator**, given the DT's role in **remote management** and **performance monitoring**. **2) Privacy Considerations**: **Real-time sensor data** (LiDAR, camera) may capture sensitive information (e.g., surroundings, other vehicles), requiring compliance with **privacy regulations** (e.g., GDPR). **3) Data Storage**: Stored in an **SQL database** on external hardware, which may introduce **access control** and **encryption** requirements. **4) Remote Management**: **Remote commands** (e.g., emergency braking) imply **authorized access controls** to prevent unauthorized interventions. **5) Compliance**: The DT must adhere to **automotive cybersecurity standards** (e.g., ISO/SAE 21434) to mitigate risks of data breaches or misuse."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: **1) Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, Part 2)** as the primary reference architecture, with adaptations for automotive use. **2) Communication Standards**: **ROS2 middleware** for intra-entity communication and **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication. **3) Automotive Standards**: **ISO 15622** for **ACC control logic** (performance class I). **4) Network Standards**: **3GPP TS 22.185** for **≤100 ms latency** requirements in V2V communication. **5) Time Synchronization**: **NTP or ROS2 time synchronization** for **100 ms clock accuracy**. **6) Software Development**: **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK** for Jetson hardware and **MATLAB/Simulink** for control algorithm development. **7) Safety Standards**: Implicit compliance with **automotive safety standards** (e.g., ISO 26262) through **real-time constraints** and **emergency braking** mechanisms."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through: **1) Real-time constraints**: **≤100 ms latency** and **100 ms clock synchronization** to ensure timely and coordinated actions. **2) Emergency overrides**: **Remote emergency braking** commands are designed to preempt DT computations if safety-critical. **3) Data integrity**: **Data Translation Functional Entity** ensures consistent message serialization and unit conversion. **4) Access control**: **Remote management** commands require **authenticated access** to prevent unauthorized interventions. **5) Fault tolerance**: **Redundant sensor data** (LiDAR + camera) and **Kalman filtering** mitigate single-point failures. **6) Cybersecurity**: Implicit adherence to **ISO/SAE 21434** for automotive cybersecurity, though not explicitly detailed. **7) Safety validation**: **ACC logic** is validated against **ISO 15622** for performance class I, with **real-time monitoring** to detect anomalies. **8) Human-in-the-Loop**: The DT falls under the **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** taxonomy, allowing operators to intervene if needed."
]
